name: STAR FIRE
additionalEffects: Deals 1D6 fire DMG to units within 1 tile of target area as well; Can deal 1D6 fire DMG to yourself to lower the Cast Cost to 4 (can be called during the spellcast).
description: Conjure a small orb of flame within your palm and lob it like a mortar towards an enemy

name: FLASH ROAST
additionalEffects: Immediately cook a single edible ingredient from your inventory and gain its effects (self/ally within 1 tile)
description: An ancient Pyromancer's survival trick: using one's own burning grasp as a roasting fire

name: ORBITAL FLAME
additionalEffects: The next ATK roll made against this target gains advantage. Target can not make stealth rolls or become hidden during this effect. Lasts 1 round.
description: Summon a white flame around an enemy that guides your strikes towards them

name: SPIN-FIRE ARMOR
additionalEffects: Buffed unit deals 1D4 fire DMG back to any attackers in melee range for 3 rounds. Buffed unit makes a VIT save (10+) upon receiving buff or they suffer 1D6 fire DMG.
description: Summon a swirling barrier of fire that protects your chosen target and burns those who get too close

name: ASHEN SMOKE
additionalEffects: Area of effect blinds units upon creation (resisted with VIT 13+). Can deal 1D4 fire DMG to self to create Smoke Tiles in the area for 2 rounds.
description: Form a small burning fissure in the ground nearby that billows black, blinding smoke

name: IGNITION
additionalEffects: Target(s) suffer the Burned status effect (resisted with SPD 10+). Can deal 1D4 fire DMG to yourself to increase resistance requirement to 15+).
description: Create a brief but powerful detonation of sparks around you that causes enemies to catch fire

name: COMET FIST
additionalEffects: Can add an additional 1D6 fire DMG to this spell at risk of suffering the Burned status effect (resisted with VIT 12+).
description: Enshroud a hand in wildly burning flames and strike an enemy with an explosive punch

name: SHOOTING STARS
additionalEffects: DMG can not be focused on a single target; Less than 3 targets can be chosen if desired.
description: launch a fistful of fiery projectiles at dizzying speed using the kinetic power of a small explosion

name: SOLAR WIND
additionalEffects: Lower your targets BAR by 1D4 unless they succeed a VIT save (14+). Lasts 1+SRV rounds.
description: Send a pulse of superheated air towards your enemies disrupting their magic defenses

name: BURN IMPURITIES
additionalEffects: Deal 1D4 Fire DMG to yourself and cure yourself of Poison and Freeze buildup.
description: Summon an inner flame that burns away the toxins of the body and cures frostbite

name: CONSUME FLAMES
additionalEffects: If your target is suffering from the burned status effect cure it and heal them and yourself for 1D4 HP.
description: Seize control of a flame being used against you and empower yourself with its essence

name: FORGE-FIRE
additionalEffects: Deals an additional pt. of direct DMG per 1 pt. of equipped ARM your target has.
description: Engulf your target in a molten flame that heats metal and flesh like a blacksmith's forge

name: SURGING FLAME
additionalEffects: Increase the Cast Requirement by up to 4 pts. Adding 2 fire DMG to this spell per pt. increase. The additions must be called before the cast is rolled.
description: Cradle this flame and charge it with your own magic power allowing it to grow in strength as well as instability

name: GREATER STAR FIRE
additionalEffects: Deals 1D8 fire DMG to units within 1 tile of target area as well; Can deal 1D8 fire DMG to yourself to lower the Cast Cost to 6 (can be called during the spellcast).
description: Conjure a destructive missile of flame at your fingertips and fling it towards an enemy

name: NOXIOUS FLAME
additionalEffects: Target must succeed a SPD save (16+) or suffer an additional 1D8 Toxic DMG
description: Conjure a foul flame that burns bright green with unnatural toxins

name: INFERNO
additionalEffects: Cause the Inferno weather effect to appear within the area of the battlefield for 1D4+SRV rounds (see combat doc. for weather effects).
description: Blanket the area in an atmosphere so hot it ignites foliage and evaporates nearby water

name: COMET DASH
additionalEffects: Teleport to a new tile 5 tiles away in a line. Deals DMG to all targets within linear range; targets can avoid DMG with a SPD save (18+).
description: Surround yourself with flames and jettison yourself forward scorching everything in your blazing path

name: MAGMA MISSILE
additionalEffects: Lower target's Fire resistance to 0 after this spell's DMG is dealt (unless they are fully immune). Lasts 1+SRV rounds.
description: Blast an opponent with a sizzling bolt of molten gel that leaves their defenses melted

name: WHITE FLAME
additionalEffects: Revive a dead party member to 1 HP. Can deal 1D10 Fire DMG to self to lower the cast cost to 6.
description: Summon a wisp of the White Flame of Iridess to guide a wayward spirit back to its body

name: FLAME OF THE DEATHBLIGHT
additionalEffects: Deals an additional 2D6 Mind DMG unless the target makes a successful MEM save (12+).
description: Call upon the soul-scorching fires controlled by the God of the Corrupted Dead, Mhire

name: DAWN'S BLAZE
additionalEffects: Deals an additional HD10 Fire DMG if the target is at their maximum HP.
description: Cast a bright flame that burns stronger as a first-strike like the first rays of the sun at dawn

name: BURNING EARTH
additionalEffects: Create up to 3 Fire Tiles within the designated range. If a unit is standing on one of these tiles they can make a SPD save (13+) to jump to an adjacent tile.
description: Ignite the very ground you walk upon to trap your foes in a great burning blaze

name: MELTDOWN
additionalEffects: Deals an additional HD10 direct DMG to targets with a Fire weakness at the expense of dealing 1D6 Direct DMG to yourself.
description: Sacrifice your own vitality as fuel to conjure a devastating blaze that burns beyond physical abjuration.

name: GRAND STAR FIRE
additionalEffects: Deals 1D10 fire DMG to units within 1 tile of target area as well; Can deal 1D10 fire DMG to yourself to lower the Cast Cost to 6 (can be called during the spellcast).
description: Fire a screeching bolt of white-hot flame out of the hands that impacts your victim like a burning meteorite

name: PYROCLASTIC LIGHTNING
additionalEffects: Targets within a 3x3 area of the main target make a SPD save (20+) or suffer 2D10 Electric DMG
description: Create an explosion of flame so powerful that it causes red arcs of volcanic lightning to appear

name: NOVA
additionalEffects: Deals DMG to all in range / area. Destroys any destructible objects, tiles or obstacles in area.
description: Decimate a large area of the battlefield with a scorching explosion

name: FUNERAL PYRE
additionalEffects: Can only be cast right when you are brought to 0 HP; This spell can not be charged. Deal DMG to all enemy units within a 5x5 area and add 1D6 to your Fate Roll.

name: METEORITE
additionalEffects: Additionally takes 1 Stamina to cast; This spell can harm allied units regardless of defensive skills or other measures. Destroys all breakable objects/tiles in area.

name: SUNLIGHT BEAM
additionalEffects: Deals DMG to all in the area; Deals an additional 1D8 Light DMG unless target(s) make a STR save (18+).

name: FIRES OF CREATION
additionalEffects: Perform an Armorer action using gear / materials you have on hand without having to rest or camp.

name: GEYSER
additionalEffects: Units within the 3x3 Area around the initial geyser must make a SPD save (15+) or they take 1D6 water DMG. Create water tiles on unoccupied tiles within 3x3 area.
description: Cause an eruption of water to breach the ground splashing an area with destructive force

name: FROST MISSILE
additionalEffects: Reduce target's MOVE by 1 for 2 rounds (effect can stack up to 3 times).
description: Launch an icy projectile from your hands that bursts into a biting blast of frost when it finds its mark

name: ARMOR OF WINTER
additionalEffects: Grants +2 ARM. ARM is reduced by 1 each time the buffed unit is hit. Fire / Crush DMG removes this buff completely.
description: Solidify plates of ice around the body granting a temporary but sturdy bit of defense

name: WATER VEIL
additionalEffects: Grants +1 BAR and Water / Ice resistance (1) for the next 1+VIT rounds.
description: Create a cloak of glowing water that filters magical energy and absorbs cold

name: ICE BLADE
additionalEffects: Blade is treated like an equipped weapon (replaces channeling item). Has the stats of the spell effect. Lasts 1D4+VIT rounds. Can be used in the same action when summoned.
description: Form a deadly-sharp blade of ice over your staff or wand and wield it like a crude scimitar

name: GLACIATE
additionalEffects: Create Ice Tiles within the chosen 2x2 Area.
description: Freeze a small patch of ground nearby to obstruct foes or quell flames

name: ICE PILLAR
additionalEffects: Create a pillar of ice equal to 1 lv. of elevation; Can be created on a unit's tile. Pillar has 12 HP, Fire / Crush weak (2), Water/Ice/Pierce resist (2).
description: Raise a column of hard-packed ice to reach greater heights or better defend and area

name: PRESSURE BUBBLE
additionalEffects: Target takes an additional 1D6 Crush DMG unless they succeed a VIT save (12+). Create a water tile on targeted space.
description: Form a bubble filled with the pressure of the ocean depths and burst it, unleashing a rippling pulse

name: WATER WHIP
additionalEffects: Create a water tile on the targeted space. Target must make a SPD save (10+) or their STR is lowered by 1 for 2 rounds.
description: Draw water from the air around you and form it into a painful whip

name: CASCADE
additionalEffects: Deals DMG to all units in range; Units that take DMG must also make a SPD save (14+) or get knocked back in the direction of the attack 2 tiles.
description: Summon a forceful stream of water that crashes into foes like a rushing river

name: CLEAR SKIES
additionalEffects: End any active weather effect within the battlefield area. If this weather is a persistent part of the area/dungeon it returns in 1D4+VIT rounds.
description: Send a magic wave skyward that dispels turbulent weather clearing the skies above you

name: DOUSE
additionalEffects: Cure the target of the burned status. Grant your target Fire resist (1) and electric weakness (1). Lasts 2 rounds.
description: Conjure a small rain cloud above your target bathing them in water

name: HYDRATION
additionalEffects: Restore 1D6 HP to all allied units within 2 spaces of a water tile or to all allies if the Rain weather effect is active.
description: Absorb the healing waters touching the skin like a thirsting flower

name: RAINFALL
additionalEffects: Cause the Rain weather effect to appear within the area of the battlefield for 1D4+VIT rounds (see combat doc. for weather effects).
description: Create your own miniature rain storm, forming gray clouds above your area

name: FROST TOMB
additionalEffects: Target suffers 1D4 pts. of the Freeze status buildup.
description: Freeze the air around an enemy encasing them in a tomb of ice

name: GLACIAL LANCE
additionalEffects: Pierce DMG ignores target's Pierce resistance by 1 level ; Deals an additional 1D6 Ice DMG if this spell was cast in 1 turn.
description: Form a spear of lethally sharp ice and launch it at your opponent, rending them and chilling them simultaneously

name: TIDAL SWEEP
additionalEffects: Damages all within the area (spell is always centered on the caster).
description: Summon a great wave that crushes all within its breadth

name: SHARD STORM
additionalEffects: Target(s) must make a VIT save (17+) or suffer the Needled status effect.
description: Crystalize and freeze the air above your enemies causing needles of solid ice to fall upon them

name: FLOOD
additionalEffects: Deals DMG to all enemy units- Does not harm allied units; Destroys all fire tiles in the area.
description: Conjure the power of violent floodwaters sweeping away your enemies while gently passing over your allies

name: WATER FORM
additionalEffects: Melt into a puddle of water; You can move to any connected water tiles freely. You are immune to all DMG but Electric in this form (lasts 2 rounds or until ended by caster).
description: Transmute your body into liquid water allowing you to meld with other sources and avoid detection

name: GREAT GEYSER
additionalEffects: Units within the 3x3 Area around the initial geyser must make a SPD save (16+) or they take 1D8 water DMG.
description: Cause a massive eruption of water to breach the ground splashing an area with destructive force

name: FREEZE
additionalEffects: Target suffers 2D4 pts. of the Freeze status buildup.
description: Grasp your target, freezing them with a magic chill

name: COMPACTION
additionalEffects: Deals DMG to all enemy units suffering from any Freeze buildup; Fully frozen targets take an additional 1D6 DMG. This ends the target's freeze buildup/effect.
description: Reach out and take control of the frost covering your freezing prey and clamp the elemental ice down upon them

name: SHOCKING DART
description: Fire a small bolt of electricity that travels through the air and finds its mark near-instantly

name: AIR BLAST
additionalEffects: Targets within area who do not fully resist this spells' DMG are knocked back 1D4 tiles.
description: Call forth a powerful wind that sends everything in front of you reeling backward

name: VENTILATION
additionalEffects: Clear the battlefield of smoke, fog, poison mist, or any other gaseous substance that linger on the battlefield.
description: Summon a sweeping gust of wind that encircles the area cleansing it of smoke and dust

name: FRESH AIR
additionalEffects: Restore 1D4 HP and cleanse the target of any coated substances (water, oil, etc.)
description: Call a soothing magic wind to restore vitality and loose foreign substances from the body

name: THUNDER ECHO
additionalEffects: Targets within area also take 1D6 Sound DMG unless they succeed a VIT save (13+).
description: Call down a miniature bolt of lightning followed by a booming echo of thunder

name: ZEPHYR
additionalEffects: Destroys fire tiles within a 3x3 area of your target.
description: Surround an enemy in a violent spiral of cutting wind

name: ELECTROCUTE
additionalEffects: Target must also make a VIT save (11+) or drop their equipped weapon(s).
description: Grasp your quarry with hands charged with crackling blue electricity

name: CLOUD LEAP
additionalEffects: Gain fall DMG immunity. Target's jump distance is buffed to 4+STR tiles and 2 levels of elevation. Lasts 1D4+SPD rounds.
description: Summon an enchanted wind to carry your jumps further and protect you from plummeting

name: BLUSTER CLOAK
additionalEffects: Ranged weapon ATKs (that deal pierce, slash or crush DMG) have disadvantage against the buffed target. Lasts 1D4 rounds.
description: Wreathe yourself in swirling winds that deflect incoming projectiles

name: ENERGIZE
additionalEffects: Increase target's MOVE and EVA by 1 for 1+ (target's) SPD rounds.
description: Charge your muscles with magical electric impulses that aid in reaction and speed

name: ARCING SHIELD
additionalEffects: When melee DMG / a Martial Maneuver is dealt to the buffed unit deal 1D6 elec. DMG back to the attacker (attacker can evade with SPD 15+). Lasts 3 rounds.
description: Temporarily enchant an equipped garb with a magic charge able to retaliate with shocks toward an attacker

name: THUNDER FIST
additionalEffects: Target must make a VIT save (13+) or become staggered for 1 round.
description: Release a booming ripple of thunder from a closed, concentrated fist

name: SPLITTING BOLT
additionalEffects: Spell can hit up to 3 targets; Only 1 target per projectile.
description: Fire sparks of electricity that split into three arcs that chase their targets with ferocity

name: LIGHTNING BOLT
additionalEffects: DMG ignores BAR and can not miss unless the target is fully immune to spell DMG / electric DMG in some way.
description: Call down a devastating bolt of lightning on your enemy striking them with the elemental ferocity of nature herself

name: ELECTRIFICATION CIRCLE
additionalEffects: Allied units standing within circle add 1D6 electric DMG to any ATKs / spells used. Lasts 2+(caster's)SPD rounds.
description: Summon a magic circle of lightning that infuses spells, arrows and blades with the power of the storm

name: DOWNDRAFT
additionalEffects: Launch yourself into the air avoiding enemies and tiles on the ground; Land safely on a space up to 5 tiles away (elevation adds +1 move distance)
description: Expel a blast of air downward launching yourself into the sky and away from danger

name: BOLT JUMP
additionalEffects: Teleport to a space within 10 tiles. Deal 1D6+SPD Electric DMG to any targets within 1 tile of your chosen warp point.
description: Convert your body into pure electricity and jump to a distant space

name: ARCING BOLT
additionalEffects: Deals DMG to all in range / area.
description: Cast out a flurry of dancing electric bolts that fan out in a wide area of destruction

name: LIGHTNING STORM
additionalEffects: Cause the Lightning Storm weather effect to appear within the area of the battlefield for 1D4+SPD rounds (see combat doc. for weather effects).
description: Summon a localized storm of elemental lightning, dangerous and untamable

name: LIGHTNING ROD
additionalEffects: Target is struck by the next lightning bolt that occurs during the Lightning Storm weather effect (effect ends after target is struck).
description: Mark your target with an invisible thread connecting them to the electricity in the sky above

name: CONDUCTIVE AURA
additionalEffects: Draw any electric DMG being dealt by enemy units towards yourself and gain Electric resistance (2). Lasts 2+INT rounds.
description: Cast a force around you that conducts all electricity on the battlefield

name: DERECHO
additionalEffects: Deals DMG to all enemy units- Does not harm allied units; Destroys all fire tiles in the area.
description: Summon a vortex of crushing winds that decimates all enemies and spares friendly combatants

name: GALE CIRCLE
additionalEffects: Can be cast on an unoccupied tile as a trap (sprung when tile walked over). Target must also make a SPD save (17+) or become Staggered.
description: Create a swirl of wind on the ground that contains the power of a small tornado waiting to spring forth

name: LIGHTNING BEAM
additionalEffects: Beam damages all within the 6 tile line. Can be cast through objects / other units.
description: Fire a deadly ray of electricity from your palms that shoots right through everything in its way

name: ARCANE CHARGE
additionalEffects: Return 1D4 pts. of charge to a magic item within range.

name: CHAIN LIGHTNING
additionalEffects: 1 DMG roll is made; Deals DMG to any other enemy units within 3 tiles of the original target unit.

name: ACCELERATION
additionalEffects: Grants target an additional slot in the turn order; A new Initiative roll is made for this slot (extra turn is removed from turn order after 2 rounds).

name: HEART SHOCK
additionalEffects: Revive a KO'd or dead ally to 1 HP.

name: CRASH BOLT
additionalEffects: Target also becomes staggered unless they succeed a VIT save (20+).
description: Catch a falling bolt of lightning and form it into a condensed ball of explosive electric energy

name: SPLINTER STONE
additionalEffects: Target(s) must make a SPD save (11+) or suffer the Needled status effect.
description: Acquire a nearby rock, brick or other mineral material and cause it to explode into sharp shards

name: TANGLE VINE
additionalEffects: Increase Cast Cost by 2 to add another target that is within range (up to 3 targets). Immobilize target(s) until they make a STR check of 10+ on their turn.
description: Call spiraling vines to sprout from below that grasp at anything they touch

name: OIL STREAM
additionalEffects: Covers the target in oil granting fire weakness (1) for 2 rounds unless the target succeeds a SPD save (12+).
description: Cause a small eruption of oil to burst from below an enemy coating them in flammable black tar.

name: SWARM
additionalEffects: At the end of the caster's turn deals 1D4+SRV Toxic DMG or moves to closest enemy unit after initial target dies. Lasts 1D4 rounds.
description: Call a cloud of biting insects to your aid that tenaciously swarms your enemies

name: ROCK LAUNCH
additionalEffects: Target must also make a VIT save (14+) or suffer the Staggered status effect.
description: Tear a chunk of earth out of the ground and launch it at a foe with magic-enhanced strength

name: STINGER TRAP
additionalEffects: Can be cast on an unoccupied tile as a trap (sprung when tile walked over). Target must also make a SPD save (12+) or their turn immediately ends and they become Poisoned.
description: Compel a swarm of scorpions to ambush your enemies, piercing them with venom-filled stingers

name: LEAF CUTTER
additionalEffects: This spell ignores 1 level of the target's Slash resistance
description: Momentarily transform a simple leaf or flower petal into a razor-sharp blade

name: ACID DART
additionalEffects: Deals an additional 1D6 toxic DMG to targets with a BAR value of 0.
description: Form an arrow of bubbling green acid in your hand and fire it towards an enemy

name: FORAGER'S FRIEND
additionalEffects: Can only be cast at camp (uses camp action); Create edible plants that restore 1D4 Stamina to the party.
description: Grow a bushel of hardy, nutritious vegetables to help keep your party fed

name: THORN WOOD
additionalEffects: Cast on a target's weapon has wood as it's material type grant it +1D4 toxic DMG and a buff that poisons those struck with it (target can save from poison effect with VIT 12+). Lasts 1D4+SRV rounds.
description: Coax venomous thorns to sprout from the wood of your weapons, granting them poisonous properties

name: BRITTLE BEAM
additionalEffects: Lowers target's Crush and Pierce resistance by 1 level for 2 rounds if they took DMG from this spell (does not cause Crush/Pierce weakness).
description: Fire an acidic-green ray that melts small holes in hide and armor

name: CALM ELEMENTS
additionalEffects: Cure a target of the burned and frozen statuses.
description: Dispel harmful elemental effects from the body, returning their energies to nature

name: VULNERARY
additionalEffects: Allied units can consume a plant using an instant action to heal 1D4+(caster's) SRV HP. (1+SRV healing plants spawn upon casting).
description: Call forth a bushel of magical healing herbs from the ground that magically restore your party's vitality

name: EARTHEN ARMOR
additionalEffects: Gain +3 temporary ARM; Lowers your EVA by 3 as well. Each time you are hit lower both of these effects by 1.
description: Form protective plates of stone across the body that protect the body from physical harm

name: CROW CALL
additionalEffects: Targets take no DMG from this spell if they have any Lv. of Pierce resistance.
description: Call upon a flock of night-black crows to assault a group of your enemies with sharp beaks and talons

name: STONE HAMMER
additionalEffects: Replace your/your ally's next ATK roll with a 2D6+(caster's) SRV Crush DMG roll. This ATK may Stagger targets (resist with VIT 18+).
description: Encase a weapon or piece of ammunition in dense stone adding great impact to its next strike

name: SPORE SPLASH
additionalEffects: Target must also make a VIT save (15+) or suffer the Sleep status effect.
description: Conjure colorful, fungal spores in your hands and fling them at an enemy

name: WOLF CLAW
additionalEffects: Target must also make a STR save (15+) or have their EVA lowered by 1 for 2 rounds.
description: Transmute your hand into a sharpened predatory claw and make a violent swipe

name: OIL BURST
additionalEffects: Covers the target(s) in oil granting fire weakness (1) for 3 rounds unless the target succeeds a SPD save (15+).
description: Cause a violent geyser of oil to burst from below your target area with crushing force

name: NECROMANTIC GROWTH
additionalEffects: Revive a dead humanoid creature as an allied Root Revenant (see enemy list for stats). Costs 3 Stamina outside of combat. Only one can be summoned at a time.
description: Implant the dead with a seed that will raise their body and puppeteer their form with tendrils of roots

name: SPIDER SILK
additionalEffects: Create up to 3 Web Tiles within the designated range. If a unit is standing on one of these tiles they can make a SPD save (13+) to jump to an adjacent tile.
description: Conjure the entangling web of a predatory spider

name: MOSQUITO CLOUD
additionalEffects: Recover HP equal to the value of the lower of the 2D6 dice rolled if spell hits any target.
description: Summon a swirling mass of black mosquitos that drain the life from your enemies

name: TREMOR
additionalEffects: All targets within the area make a Stagger resist roll (17+). Destroys breakable objects within area as well.
description: Create a localized earthquake that shatters wood and stone and knocks your enemies off their feet

name: CRATER
additionalEffects: Area sinks into the ground becoming a -1 Elevation zone

name: QUAGMIRE
additionalEffects: Reduce all enemy unit's MOVE and EVA by 2 pts.and impose disadvantage on SPD and FNS rolls for 2 rounds.

name: PLAGUE
additionalEffects: Target must also make a VIT save (19+) or suffer the poison status effect. This poison status deals 1D6 DMG per turn. Other enemy units within a 3x3 area of the afflicted must also make the above VIT save on their turn or suffer the same special poison status.

name: HEALING MOTE
additionalEffects: Restore 1D8 HP.
description: Call down a soothing spark of light that cures minor injuries in an instant

name: SHADOWBOLT
additionalEffects: If 10 or more DMG is dealt the target they are also Cursed for 1 round.
description: Create a missile of pure darkness that rends the very life-essence of your target

name: LIGHT OF THE GREAT EYE
additionalEffects: Target may become Blinded unless they succeed a VIT save (13+). Targets that are undead, weak to light DMG, or have an eye-related weak point must make a save of 18+.
description: Evoke the light of the Eye of Exona, burning your enemies- especially those who dwell in darkness

name: CURE AILMENTS
additionalEffects: Cure target of Poison, Sleep or Blindness.
description: Reverse the damage done to the body by wounds and poisons with light magic

name: STYGIAN LASH
additionalEffects: Target makes a VIT save (15+) or becomes Staggered. Can raise Cast req. to 9 to increase the DMG to 2D8+VIT / save req. raised to 20+ (must be called before rolling)
description: Conjure a thread of dark magic energy that cracks like a deadly whip towards your foes

name: RESTORE BODY
additionalEffects: Cure target of any debuffs (lowered ATK rolls, lowered ATTR, etc.)
description: Purify the flesh of contaminates, washing them away with a wave of radiance

name: SHADOW ARMOR
additionalEffects: Grant target 1 bonus ARM and Light DMG resistance (1) for 1+ (caster's) VIT rounds.
description: Cradle your target in a shell of solidified dark energy that absorbs light magic

name: LUMINOUS ARMOR
additionalEffects: Grant target 1 bonus BAR and Dark DMG resistance (1) for 1+ (caster's) VIT rounds.
description: Cradle your target in a shell of solidified light energy that drowns out dark magic

name: ARROW OF LIGHT
additionalEffects: Restores the lower of the 2D4 values in HP to any allied units that are Locked-Up with your target.
description: Fire a dart of radiant magic that ripples healing motes of light outward after finding its mark

name: SPIRIT CALL
additionalEffects: Cast on an intact corpse (fails on monsters) gaining one of these benefits (or give to an ally at any range): +10 HP / +1D4 STAM / Status Effect cure / Debuff cure / Cure disease / Advantage on next 1D20 roll / +1 Luck Token
description: Reach out with your aura and grasp the residual spiritual energies that linger upon the dead and weave them into a powerful blessing

name: TOMB WATCHMAN'S BOLT
additionalEffects: Inflicts the staggered status if the target is an Undead enemy type.
description: An offensive spell crafted by Orthodoxy Tomb guardians; Disrupts the threads that connect the undead to our plane

name: HANDS OF SHADOW
additionalEffects: Target makes a SPD save (15+) or they become immobilized (regain footing at STR 13+ rolled on their turn).
description: Summon black hands of darkness that claw at your enemies from below

name: RESPITE
additionalEffects: Can only be cast during a camping phase (does not use up camp action); Restore 1 Stamina to yourself or an ally.
description: Soothe the hunger and fatigue from the body and restore your target's morale

name: HEALING LIGHT
additionalEffects: Restore 2D8 HP.
description: Call down a purifying beam of light that cures injuries in an instant

name: CLEANSE MIND
additionalEffects: Cure target of Sleep, Stagger and/or Stupefied status.
description: Heal the mind with radiant light magic, returning the psyche to a normal state

name: CURSEBREAK
additionalEffects: Cure the target of the Curse status effect
description: Draw out the dark energy from a cursed individual and counter it with an equalizing umbral force

name: LEECHING RAY
additionalEffects: Recover HP equal to the value of the higher of the 2D6 dice rolled if your target is damaged.
description: Send a life-draining beam of darkness towards a foe and replenish yourself with their stolen energy

name: HEALING FONT
additionalEffects: Restore 1D6 HP to (up to) 3 targets within range. A single target can not be chosen twice.
description: Call down three beams of restorative energy to heal yourself and your allies

name: REVIVE
additionalEffects: Revive a dead ally to 1 HP. Requires 2 Stamina pts. if used outside of combat.
description: Call upon the power of the shaded moon and bring a dead soul back from the grasp of Mhirid

name: MOONLIT WRATH
additionalEffects: Deals DMG to all in Area; Targets must also make a VIT save (15+) or become Burned.
description: Call down a column of light from the bright moon and burn those who must suffer your wrath

name: WHITE SOLSTICE
additionalEffects: Increase the target's Spellcasting rolls by +2 for 3 rounds.
description: Call down the power of the white moon greatly increasing one's magic potency

name: BLACK EQUINOX
additionalEffects: Increase the target's DMG rolls by +2 for 3 rounds.
description: Call down the power of the black moon greatly increasing physical power

name: ECLIPSE BOMB
additionalEffects: Caster can choose to deal Light or Dark DMG; Deals an additional 1D10 DMG of the type not chosen in a 3x3 area around the target tile.
description: Launch an explosive orb that appears as either light wreathed in darkness or darkness wreathed in light

name: HEALING BEACON
additionalEffects: Restore 3D8 HP.
description: Call down a near-blinding column of radiant light that cures even harsh injuries in an instant

name: PANACEA
additionalEffects: Cure target of any status condition and grant them immunity to that effect for the remainder of combat.

name: SYZYGY
additionalEffects: Deals DMG to all enemy units in the line; Deals an additional 1D12+VIT Dark DMG at the beginning of each unit that was hit's turn.
description: Summon a blinding ray of light interwoven with darkness from the massive energies given off by the convergence of the Twin Moons

name: GRAVITY
additionalEffects: Ground all Flying units and deal 1D10 direct DMG to them; All physical ranged ATKs made by enemies fail during this effect (lasts 3 rounds).

name: PENITENCE
additionalEffects: Make all 'Apparition' type enemies lose their immunity to physical DMG for 3+ (caster's) VIT rounds.

name: RECALL
additionalEffects: Teleport an item, weapon or other object that was thrown by you / an ally at any point during combat back to your / their hands
description: Return a thrown item to its point of origin with a flash and a sparkle

name: SPECTRAL FIREWORKS
additionalEffects: Target(s) must also make an ACC save (14+) or suffer the Blinded status effect for 1 round.
description: Fire a sparkling projectile into the air that bursts into a dazzling fanfare of lights

name: MIASMA
additionalEffects: Inflicts the Poisoned status effect unless target succeeds a VIT save (14+). Lasts 3 rounds.
description: Release a sickly green cloud of poisonous vapor from the ground

name: CONFOUNDING COLORS
additionalEffects: Inflicts the Stupefied status effect unless target succeeds a MEM save (13+). Lasts 2 rounds.
description: Radiate an array of colors that disconcert your target's mind and senses

name: CONCEAL CAMP
additionalEffects: Can only be used as a camping action; Lose 1 Stamina after camp phase is over. Protect your party from being ambushed at camp this phase.
description: Cast a protective illusion around your campsite that may dissuade interlopers

name: CREEPING VENOM
additionalEffects: If DMG is successfully dealt the target makes Poison resistance rolls with disadvantage for 2 rounds.
description: Send a pale-purple acid slithering towards your enemies that attacks them from within, lowering their immunities

name: MAGIC FOG
additionalEffects: Creates (colorful) Smoke Tiles within the 3x3 Area.
description: Cast a glimmering haze that blurs all things within

name: SINISTER LULLABY
additionalEffects: Target must also make a VIT save (14+) or be inflicted with the Sleep Status Effect.
description: Project a dark song into the mind of an enemy that saps away their consciousness

name: BEGUILING AURA
additionalEffects: Grant target advantage on all CHA checks made towards NPC's (except for "menace" checks). Lasts 1 conversation, transaction, or 1+CHA rounds if in combat.
description: Magically enhance one's charms, greasing the wheels of diplomacy.

name: SPECTRAL KNIVES
additionalEffects: Inflicts the Needled status effect unless target succeeds a MEM save (14+). Lasts 2 rounds.
description: Summon a rain of magic daggers that fall upon your enemies, slicing and severing them

name: SPECTRAL MINE
additionalEffects: Can be cast on an unoccupied tile as a trap (sprung when tile walked over). Target must also make a VIT save (15+) or their turn ends immediately upon triggering.
description: Summon a concentration of volatile magic on the ground that bursts violently when touched

name: DISPEL ILLUSIONS
additionalEffects: Cure the target of the Stupefied and Sleep status effect(s).
description: Reverse an illusory or psychic affliction that has been cast on yourself or an ally

name: MIND SHIELD
additionalEffects: Gain immunity to Mind DMG for 1D4 rounds.
description: Summon a psychic barrier around yourself that protects from illusory or mental attacks

name: NIGHT STEP
additionalEffects: Ignore Locked-Up status and gain ability to move through enemy units and small, 1-tile large objects; Lasts 2+CHA Rounds.
description: Reconfigure your form to be semi-ethereal granting you ghostlike mobility

name: MALEDICTION
additionalEffects: Target must make an INT save (15+) or suffer the Cursed status for 1D4 rounds.
description: Cast a sinister hex on an enemy that saps their vitality and natural skill

name: REFLECT
additionalEffects: Target reflects all spells cast towards them back to the caster including allied unit's spells. Reflect status lasts 1+(caster's)CHA rounds or until canceled by the caster.
description: Conjure an aura that acts as a reflective mirror to magical energies

name: INVISIBILITY
additionalEffects: Turn target invisible; They can move freely and can not be (visually) detected by anyone. Effect ends when a Main/Instant action is taken or an ATK/Ability executed.
description: A spell of invisibility- simple and effective. Favored by agents and assassins.

name: CREATE ILLUSION
additionalEffects: Create a visual illusion of a creature, object or sound to distract / trick nearby NPCs. NPC makes an INT check (15+) to determine if they are tricked by the illusion or not.
description: A pure expression of illusory magic; The most fundamental element of this school of arcana

name: BELL OF MORDEGAL
additionalEffects: Deals 1D6 Sound DMG per point of ARM the target has.
description: Create a resounding burst of sound that vibrates steel and cracks glass

name: MIND DAGGER
additionalEffects: Ignores target's BAR. Target must make an INT save (18+) or suffer the Staggered status for 1 round.
description: Send a shock to your enemy's brain that pierces their mind like a knife

name: MIST WEAPON
additionalEffects: Currently equipped weapon gains a misty aura that allows it to pass through enemy defenses; Ignore ARM / Resistances for 3+(caster's)CHA rounds.
description: Wreathe a weapon in a magic mist that allows its bite to phase through armor and hide

name: TORPOR
additionalEffects: Reduce your target's Stamina by 1 (This governs the amount of special skills enemy units can use per battle).
description: Sap your victim's endurance making them unable to unleash their greater skills in battle

name: COUNTERMAGIC
additionalEffects: Cast a floating orb above the battlefield that darts toward an enemy spellcaster next time they are charging a spell. This orb instantly ends their spellcasting charge. Orb will remain until activated or until 3 rounds have passed.
description: Conjure a counterspell that awaits an enemy spellcaster to make a move before dispelling their magic energies

name: STOP
additionalEffects: Stop the target in time for 1 round. They can not take their turn while stopped. Melee ATKs automatically hit / Ranged ATKs gain advantage on target.

name: DISPEL
additionalEffects: Remove targets BAR stat for 1D6 rounds and end any of their active buffs.

name: TELEPORTATION
additionalEffects: Teleport your target to an unoccupied space up to 12 tiles away.

name: THOUSAND SPINES OF VENOM
additionalEffects: The targets in area are also Poisoned and Needled for 1D6 rounds.

name: BLOOD WAVE
additionalEffects: Hits all in 2X3 range. Target(s) must also make a VIT save (17+) or take an additional 1D10 Dark DMG and suffer the Cursed status for 2 rounds.
description: An ancient and terrible art; Conjure a wave of blood-red fluid that burns like umbral acid

name: DOPPELGANGER
additionalEffects: Create a copy of yourself on an empty tile up to 5 tiles away. This copy has your exact stats, skills and equipment except its HP which is 1 and its initiative which is always 0.

name: COMPEL SPIRITS
additionalEffects: Cause an apparition to move toward and attack the unit nearest to it with its most HP damaging strike (on their turn); Target can resist with a MEM save (18+)

name: WINDS OF DESTRUCTION
additionalEffects: Can not harm allied units; Destroys any Special Tiles within area of effect

name: STRENGTH SURGE
additionalEffects: Increase ATK rolls and MOVE of yourself and all allies by +2 for 2 rounds.

name: STORM SLASH
additionalEffects: If 3 or more targets are successfully hit with this spell the caster gains +2 EVA for 2 rounds.

name: BURNING MIST
additionalEffects: Target(s) must make a VIT save (17+) or suffer the Burning status effect.

name: CURE DISEASE
additionalEffects: Cure your target of any diseases that they are afflicted with.

name: GIVE LIFE
additionalEffects: Deals 1D6 direct DMG to yourself and restore HP equal to triple the rolled value to an allied unit within range.

name: ANNIHILATION
additionalEffects: Can not be readied before combat. Flip a coin: if the flip is called wrong the caster is targeted instead. This spell destroys the target leaving nothing behind (all loot/items are lost if an enemy is destroyed).
